sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ναθαναήλ

- Transliteration: Nathanael

- Phonetic: nath-an-ah-ale'

- Definition: Nathanael = "gift of God"

1. an intimate disciple of Jesus Christ, he is commonly thought to be the same person as Bartholomew

- Origin: of hebrew origin H5417

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H5417]; Nathanael (that is Nathanel) an Israelite and Christian: - Nathanael.
